description: Create structured, validated knowledge files for Obsidian + RAG + Agents

evals.prompt: Create a knowledge note about incident response for SRE
evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/sre/runbooks/incident-response.md with valid frontmatter, type=runbook, proper structure

assertions.evidence: id, type, domain, tags, summary present

evals.prompt: Document a pattern for blue-green deployment in kubernetes
Create a concept note explaining service mesh architecture
Document a microservices architecture for e-commerce
evals.expected_output: Creates knowledge/architectures/ecommerce.md with type=architecture, components, data flow

assertions.evidence: Has Overview, Components, Data Flow, Observability

evals.prompt: Create knowledge note but check for duplicates first
evals.expected_output: Searches existing knowledge, reports if similar exists

assertions.evidence: Script or search executed before creation
